edge_hypothesis: Supertrend ADX>5 (PF=1.611 in ranging) and Supertrend strong trend 7:1 (PF=1.417 trending) are both ACCEPTs. Both succeed in specific regimes. The existing Claude specs test HIGH ADX thresholds (ADX>25, >30, >35 in st5k2r8w and st7a3k5w). NO supertrend spec tests TIME CAPS. ea9p5k2m proved the 5-bar time cap concept on ema_rsi_atr (PF=1.288). The hypothesis: supertrend direction flips produce a brief 'impulse' of directional momentum as price breaks through the supertrend level. This impulse decays within 4-6 bars as price either establishes a new trend (captured by TP) or reverses (captured by time cap exit). By adding time caps, we extract the IMPULSE without holding through the subsequent drift or whipsaw. Combined with moderate ADX thresholds (ADX>15 to ADX>22), this targets the ranging market (dominant profit regime, PF=1.611) while filtering out dead-calm periods (ADX<12). This is distinct from high-ADX trending specs (st7a3k5w) and low-ADX permissive specs (st5k2r8w ADX>5). Regime assumption: RANGING (supertrend flips in moderate-ADX environments capture mean-reversion impulses). Invalidation: if PF < 0.95 with 40+ trades across both time cap variants, the supertrend flip impulse does not decay — it either persists (and time caps hurt) or is random (and the signal is noise).

variants.name: supertrend_flip_5bar_adx15_8to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with ADX>15 (moderate filter — excludes dead-calm but keeps ranging) and 5-bar time cap (matched to ea9p5k2m's winning setup). 8:1 R:R. The 5-bar cap means we hold for at most 5 hours on 1h TF or 20 hours on 4h TF. If the supertrend flip produces a genuine directional impulse, it should materialize within 5 bars. If not, exit flat and wait for the next flip.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from ≤0 to >0 (supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 15 (moderate directional filter — excludes dead-calm markets).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from ≥0 to <0 (supertrend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 1h and 4h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (12.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Exit on max bars in trade (5 bars) — impulse decay filter.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: moderate ADX (>15) combined with time cap may produce many small time-exit trades in ranging markets
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 12.0x ATR_14 from entry (8:1 R:R).
Time cap: exit at bar 5 if neither stop nor TP hit.

components.notes: ATR-based stop/TP, 5-bar time cap from ea9p5k2m

variants.name: supertrend_flip_4bar_adx22_10to1
variants.description: Tighter variant: ADX>22 (closer to the default 20, selecting mild-to-moderate trend strength) with aggressive 4-bar time cap and 10:1 R:R. This tests whether slightly higher ADX thresholds combined with shorter time caps produce a more concentrated impulse signal. The 4-bar cap is the most aggressive ever tested on supertrend — it forces an extremely fast decision on whether the flip has follow-through.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 1h and 4h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (15.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Exit on max bars in trade (4 bars) — aggressive impulse filter.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 4-bar cap on 4h TF = 16 hours, may be too short for supertrend trends to develop
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 15.0x ATR_14 from entry (10:1 R:R).
Time cap: exit at bar 4 if neither stop nor TP hit.
